reference: It's not advisable to correct the bend in the lingual arch on your own. I would recommend that you visit your orthodontist to have it corrected. This way, you will learn not to play with your lingual arch next time.
text: It's not advisable to correct the bend in the lingual arch on your own. I would recommend that you visit your orthodontist to have it corrected. This way, you will learn not to play with your lingual arch next time.
